scripts.build: pnpm --filter bnot-sidecar build && cargo build -p bnot-bridge --release && tauri build
scripts.build:dev: pnpm --filter bnot-sidecar build && cargo build -p bnot-bridge --release && tauri build --config apps/desktop/tauri.dev.conf.json && pkill -x bnot 2>/dev/null; rm -rf /Applications/Bnot.app && cp -R target/release/bundle/macos/Bnot.app /Applications/Bnot.app && echo 'installed → /Applications/Bnot.app'
